name: Slime War
author: Poki
description: Slime Wars is an engaging idle game where two armies of slimes face off in an epic battle. As the commander of the Blue Slimes, your mission is to fend off the formidable Red Slimes. With each session, you can upgrade your slimes by boosting their combat abilities and unlocking new units. Gather resources, strengthen your army, and deploy strategies to gain the upper hand and defeat the Red Slimes. In this endless war, only the strongest and most strategic will prevail! How do I play Slime War? Use your mouse to click on different buttons in order to summon and upgrade your units! Who created Slime War? Slime War is created by Shima. Play their other game on Poki: Stickman Run ! How can I play Slime War for free? You can play Slime War for free on Poki. Can I play Slime War on mobile devices and desktop? Slime War can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
